meta.title: Admin — Test Errors — kalandra.tech
meta.description: Trigger test errors to verify observability pipelines.

hero.title: Test Errors
hero.subtitle: Trigger server errors to verify Sentry and Better Stack capture them.

accessDenied.title: Access Denied
accessDenied.description: You need admin privileges to view this page.

buttons.throwErrorDescription: Calls POST /api/test-errors/throw — the server throws immediately.
buttons.crashAfterDataDescription: Calls GET /api/test-errors/crash-after-data — fetches one page of job offers, then throws.

results.triggered: Error triggered — check your observability dashboard.
results.unexpectedSuccess: Unexpected success — the endpoint should have returned an error.
